lines.speaker: DR. THOMPSON
lines.line: How's our patient doing today, Sofia?
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of DR. THOMPSON, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: NURSE VALENCIA
lines.line: Stable, doctor. The patient's vitals are looking good.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of DR. THOMPSON, his eyes fixed on the clipboard as he speaks.

lines.speaker: DR. THOMPSON
lines.line: Excellent. Let's take a look at the scans and see how the injury is healing.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of NURSE VALENCIA, a gentle smile on her face as she speaks.

lines.speaker: JAXON REED
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of JAXON REED, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: NURSE VALENCIA
lines.line: You were in an accident, Jaxon. You're safe now.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of JAXON REED, confusion etched on his face as he tries to remember.

lines.speaker: JAXON REED
lines.line: An accident? I don't remember anything.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of NURSE VALENCIA, her hand gently stroking JAXON REED's arm as she speaks.

lines.speaker: DR. THOMPSON
lines.line: Don't worry, Jaxon. You've been through a lot. We'll get you back on your feet in no time.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of JAXON REED, his eyes squinting in concentration as he tries to recall.

lines.speaker: JAXON REED
lines.line: I had a dream...I was driving, and then...and then something happened.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of JAXON REED, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: NURSE VALENCIA
lines.line: Try to relax, Jaxon. You're safe here.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of JAXON REED, his eyes wide with fear as he recounts the dream.

lines.speaker: DR. THOMPSON
lines.line: We'll do some more tests in the morning, and we'll get to the bottom of this.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of NURSE VALENCIA, her voice soothing as she speaks.

lines.speaker: JAXON REED
lines.line: I just want to go home...please.
lines.visual_cue: Over-the-shoulder shot of DR. THOMPSON, his eyes fixed on Jaxon's face as he speaks.
